title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabHotels International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabHotels International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the FabHotels International Enterprises family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FabHotels International Enterprises:
FabHotels International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels International Enterprises!
